# Kuray Karaaslan — kuray.dev

> Personal portfolio and engineering blog by Kuray Karaaslan, a Full-Stack Developer (React, Next.js, Node.js, Java Spring Boot) based in Turkey. Focus areas: multi-tenant SaaS, IoT platforms, BIM tooling, and developer experience.

## About

- Role: Full-Stack Developer
- Stack: React, Next.js, React Native, Node.js, TypeScript, Java Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, Redis
- Location: Turkey (remote-friendly)
- Languages: English, Turkish
- Available for freelance and consulting work

## Key URLs

- [Homepage](https://kuray.dev/)
- [About](https://kuray.dev/about)
- [Projects](https://kuray.dev/projects) — portfolio with case studies
- [Blog](https://kuray.dev/blog) — technical articles and tutorials
- [Contact](https://kuray.dev/contact)
- [RSS Feed](https://kuray.dev/feed.xml)
- [Sitemap](https://kuray.dev/sitemap.xml)
